headline: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) Expands Stock Buyback Authorization by 5M Shares
summary: Jack Henry & Associates Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY) is one of the most promising mid-cap stocks to buy according to analysts. On May 12, Jack Henry & Associates announced that its Board of Directors has increased the company’s stock repurchase authorization by 5 million shares, expanding the total remaining authorization to 6.4 million shares. The company noted […]
